branding.name: Stage Ready Performance
branding.description: Stage Ready Performance bridges science and artistry through specialized training programs for dancers, athletes, teams, studios, and individuals.
branding.founderTagline: Lea-Janell brings a rare and powerful combination of professional ballet experience and collegiate strength and conditioning expertise.

hero.title: Unlock Your Peak
hero.description: At Stage Ready Performance, we empower artists and athletes to achieve their highest potential through specialized training programs designed for excellence.

principles.title: Progressive Overload
principles.description: Systematically increasing demands to help you break through plateaus.

principles.title: Science-Backed
principles.description: Rooted in scientific principles and tailored with performance data.

principles.title: Total Development
principles.description: Speed, agility, strength, hypertrophy, and explosive power.

principles.title: Longevity
principles.description: Stability, mobility, and flexibility for a healthy performance career.

principles.title: Teams & Studios
principles.description: Services for professional teams, dance studios, and individuals.

principles.title: Free Consultation
principles.description: A complimentary 30-minute session to discuss your goals.

services.title: Dance
services.description: Structured curriculum and strength systems for dancers and studios.

services.title: Sport
services.description: Team training through Train Heroic for strength, speed, and durability.

services.title: Personal Training
services.description: Individualized programming for health, strength, and movement quality.

methodology.title: Science Meets Artistry
methodology.description: Movement analyzed. Performance elevated. SRP combines sports science, biomechanics, movement quality, and intentional programming.

founder.name: Lea-Janell Mitchell, MS, CSCS
founder.description: Lea-Janell brings a rare and powerful combination of professional ballet experience and collegiate strength and conditioning expertise. Her unique background allows her to bridge the gap between artistry and athleticism, creating programs that are both scientifically rigorous and deeply attuned to the demands of performance.
education: Master of Science in Strength and Conditioning, with a thesis on ballet cross-training and landing mechanics.
BFA in Dance Performance and Ballet Pedagogy from The Hartt School.
Certified Strength and Conditioning Specialist (CSCS) through the NSCA.

dancePackages.name: Corps Package
features: Clear objectives and goals for each level.
Three written lesson plans per level.
Complete glossary with exercise descriptions, meanings, and photos.

dancePackages.name: Soloist Package
features: Includes all aspects of the Corps Package.
Studio-specific grading sheet for two semesters.
Sections for etiquette, technique, ensemble, and more.

dancePackages.name: Prima Package
features: Includes all aspects of the Soloist Package.
Additional curriculum for pre-pointe and pointe classes.
Pointe shoe fitting, sewing, and shoe life/pricing guide.

dancePackages.name: Etoile Package
features: Teacher access to exercise videos, descriptions, and messaging center.

sportPackages.name: 4-Week Strength
sportPackages.description: 2–3 days per week of focused strength training.

sportPackages.name: 4-Week Total Performance
sportPackages.description: 5–6 days per week of integrated strength and speed training.

sportPackages.name: 6-Week Strength
sportPackages.description: 2–3 days per week of focused strength training.

sportPackages.name: 6-Week Total Performance
sportPackages.description: 5–6 days per week of integrated strength and speed training.

footer.title: SRP
footer.tagline2: Evidence-based training bridging dance, sport, and lifelong performance.
